name: Marksman
description: Firearms specialist who can attack twice with their chosen weapon type.
level_1_feature: Choose one class of firearms. You can attack twice with it. You can also quick reload firearms.

name: Melee Expert
description: Close-quarters fighter with specialized martial techniques.
level_1_feature: Choose a fighting move from the list below.

options.name: Hadoukan
options.description: Chi-based ranged attack (60ft range), inflicts 2D6 damage. No spell check required.

options.name: Crouching Tiger
options.description: Make 30ft jumps and feather fall 60 feet for free.

options.name: Blind Fighting
options.description: Blind sight with a radius of 30ft.

options.name: Steel Fist
options.description: Punches inflict 2D6 damage. Combined with Iron Leg: 3D6 magical damage.

options.name: Iron Leg
options.description: Kicks inflict 2D6 damage. Combined with Steel Fist: 3D6 magical damage.

options.name: Iron Toad
options.description: You are always considered to be wearing medium armor.

options.name: Whirlwind
options.description: Make a second attack when making unarmed or melee attacks.

name: Elemental Avatar
description: Elemental caster creating bolt, cube, explosion, and wall effects. Spell DC = 10 + chosen stat.
level_1_feature: Create a Bolt using your chosen element on your turn (120ft, 2D6, no check required).

name: Wage Mage
description: Street mage casting 1st-3rd level spells via mana points (5 MP/level). Spell DC = 10 + attribute.
level_1_feature: Can cast 1st level spells (cost 2 MP). Learn 2 spells of a level you can cast.

name: Espionage Agent
description: Expert in stealth, deception, lockpicking, codebreaking, acrobatics, sleight of hand, and perception.
level_1_feature: Rogue skills (Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, Perception, Deception, Lockpicking, Codebreaking) rolled with advantage. Backstab: attacking an unaware target deals double damage (one attack only).
